Case Studies

Real work, real results

Meta Ads · Performance Marketing

Meta Ads Management — Charlotte's House Jewelry

Planned, launched, and optimized Meta Ads campaigns for a jewelry e-commerce brand. Managed creative testing across carousels, image ads, reels, and instant experience formats — all on a small daily budget.

Campaign results
5.39xAvg. ROAS
8,591Link clicks
456Purchases

CRM · GoHighLevel · Sales Operations

Full Sales Pipeline — GoHighLevel

Designed and built a complete 8-stage sales pipeline in GoHighLevel to manage the entire customer lifecycle — from first contact to post-sale follow-up and cancellation handling.

Stages built: New Leads → Leads en Nurturing → Lead Frío → Hot Leads → Pedido Realizado → Pedido Completado → Seguimiento Post-Venta → Pedido Cancelado/Reembolsado
Result: Zero leads fell through the cracks. Every contact had a defined next action and ownership at each stage.

SOPs · Team Operations · Knowledge Base

Complete Onboarding & Operations System — Charlotte's House

Built a full internal knowledge base from scratch covering: team onboarding (3-stage training plan), customer service policies, product guides, sales techniques, tools access, shipping workflows, and resource library — all in a structured Google Docs system.

10+ documents built across interview process, onboarding, policies, products, sales, express shipping, tutorials, and resource guides.
Result: New contractors could onboard independently within their first week without requiring constant manager input.

E-commerce · WooCommerce · Automation

E-commerce Store + CRM Automation — Charlotte's House

Managed the full WooCommerce storefront: product listings, categories, promotions, loyalty rewards, and customer experience. In parallel, built an Instagram DM automation workflow in GoHighLevel to capture and route inbound leads 24/7.

Store managed: charlotteshousesv.com — product catalog, best sellers, offers, loyalty program, and FAQ.
Automation: Instagram DM workflow routes every inbound message to the right pipeline stage instantly — zero manual triage needed.

Funnel Design · GoHighLevel · Lead Generation

Lead Magnet Funnel — Smart Money Lab

Designed and deployed a full landing page integrated with GoHighLevel to capture leads via a free guide offer. Built the opt-in page, connected the form to an automated email delivery sequence, and structured the email library into segmented campaigns by topic.

Result: Fully automated lead-to-email pipeline live at go.smartmoneylab.co with 6 segmented campaign folders.

CRM Automation · GoHighLevel · Instagram

Instagram DM Automation Workflow

Built a multi-branch automation triggered by Instagram DM replies. The system qualifies leads, applies smart tags, and routes contacts to the correct workflow branch (View Catalog, FAQ, or Talk to Advisor) — all without manual intervention.

Result: Every inbound DM is captured, tagged, and routed within seconds — even outside business hours.
